name: Pholcodine
description: Pholcodine is a drug which is an opioid cough suppressant (antitussive). It helps suppress unproductive coughs and also has a mild sedative effect, but has little or no analgesic effects. It is also known as morpholinylethylmorphine and homocodeine. Pholcodine is not prescribed in the United States where it is classed as a Schedule I drug.
indication: For use as a cough suppressant.

interactions.name: Tranylcypromine
interactions.description: Pholcodine may increase the serotonergic activities of Tranylcypromine.
